source: UNMAPPED demo crosswalk (US SOC 2010 codes from Frey–Osborne extract → indicative ISCO-08 unit / minor groups)
methodology_note: These are approximate correspondences for hackathon personas. SOC and ISCO are different national/international systems; production systems should use official concordance tables (e.g. U.S. BLS SOC structure at https://www.bls.gov/soc/ and ILO ISCO-08 at https://www.ilo.org/public/english/bureau/stat/isco/isco08/).

mappings.rationale: Retail sales floor roles align most closely with ISCO-08 5223 (shop sales).
Passenger road transport driving maps to ISCO-08 8322.
Digital audiovisual post-production is closest to multimedia design occupations (2166) under ISCO-08.

mappings.soc_title: Telecommunications Equipment Installers and Repairers, Except Line Installers
mappings.isco08_title: Information and communications technology installers and servicers
mappings.rationale: Hands-on repair of communications equipment aligns with ISCO-08 7422.
Elementary field/crop labour is closest to ISCO-08 9211 within agricultural labourers.

mappings.soc_title: Textile Winding, Twisting, and Drawing Out Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
mappings.isco08_title: Machine operators for textile products not elsewhere classified
mappings.rationale: Machine-based textile production work maps to ISCO-08 8153.
Strategic marketing management aligns with ISCO-08 2431.
